column1: text
The vendor was non-compliant and missing approval for multiple invoices.
Payment delayed due to policy review - justified and neutral.
Unauthorized access detected in the system.
There is no supporting document for the expense claim.
Audit revealed repeated late submissions from the finance team.
Policy changes caused confusion in vendor onboarding documentation.
Critical controls were bypassed during the procurement process.
Evidence of fraud was not found, but monitoring controls are weak.
The internal system flagged unusual patterns in payment requests.
Employee travel expenses lacked manager approval.
There were inconsistencies in contract terms across multiple vendors.
Audit noted lack of segregation of duties in critical processes.
Complaints about delayed salary credits were found across regions.
Compliance gaps were noted in anti-money laundering procedures.
Supplier invoices had duplicate entries leading to overpayment.
Risk management framework lacks updates for new regulations.
Unauthorized user roles were assigned in the HR portal.
Key financial reconciliations were missed in the last quarter.
Delays in project delivery were linked to resource mismanagement.
Audit recommended enhanced monitoring of high-value transactions.
